name: blink-presentation
description: Blink's official on-brand style for HTML deliverables — presentations, reports, PRDs, BRDs, business docs, release notes, event recaps, and any long-form scroll-based shareable. Runs a mandatory intake flow (intake, study, style, follow-ups, four leverage questions, build) before generating. Enforces Blink brand (dark theme, coral accents, Inter, Blink logo, hamburger side nav, scroll progress bar, micro-animations, print styles) with hard alignment rules on donut charts, card bottom-alignment, and calibrated screen-share sizing.
